PHOTOGRAPHIC EVIDENCE AND A DAMAGE SURVEY CONFIRMED A TORNADO WITH INTERMITTENT DAMAGE FROM NEAR KNOX DALE-PANIC ROAD AND CENTER HILL ROAD TO NEAR ANITA. DAMAGE WAS LIMITED TO TREES IN ROUGH AND FORESTED TERRAIN. NO STRUCTURAL DAMAGE WAS NOTED. THE TORNADO WAS RATED EF0 ON THE ENHANCED FUJITA SCALE...WITH MAXIMUM WIND OF 80 MPH. THE TORNADO ENDED AT 435 PM. SEE PITPNSPBZ FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
